content:
I am currently a second-year Ph.D. student in the Department of Computer Science and Technology, Tsinghua University, advised by Prof. Xiaolin Hu. I received the B.E. degree from the Department of Computer Science and Technology, Huazhong University of Science and Technology in 2018.
My research interest includes deep learning and computer vision.

title: Chufeng Tang

summary: The IEEE International Conference on Computer Vision (**ICCV**), 2019
title: Improving Pedestrian Attribute Recognition With Weakly-Supervised Multi-Scale Attribute-Specific Localization
